subcodes.first_line: O spiritual beloved! The nightingale of truth hath found release from its prison cage and hath taken flight unto the nest in the divine realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب روحانی بلبل حقیقت از لانه زندان رها یافت و بآشیان ایوان یزدان پرواز
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death
